strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
Entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform
concerns: Limited direct experience in cloud technologies and AI strategy
No explicit experience in advising customers or partners on AI technologies
Lack of a graduate degree in an AI-related field
response.justification: The candidate has relevant technical skills, including experience with AI-agent infrastructure and various programming languages. Their entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective is a plus. However, the lack of direct experience in AI strategy and cloud technologies is a significant concern.
